---
title: "Dölken Lab is now ONline"
date: 2026-02-10
categories: [Updates]
---

The new website for the group is now ON. Proudly created in-house by one of our students.

![Overview of proudful moment (The camera adds at least 5 kgs).<br> Thanks to Yan for the pic.](../img/website_done.jpeg)

[← Return to News Overview](../news.qmd){.btn .btn-orange .btn-sm role="button"}
[← Return to Homepage](../index.qmd){.btn .btn-orange .btn-sm role="button"}
